name: ICE Mortgage Technology Encompass API
what_it_does: ICE Mortgage Technology Encompass REST API for mortgage loan origination system (LOS) automation. Enables AI agents to manage loan file creation and pipeline management for mortgage origination automation, handle document upload and indexing for loan file document management, access loan data fields and milestone management for loan workflow automation, retrieve compliance checking and HMDA data collection for regulatory reporting, manage underwriting condition tracking for loan approval workflow, handle pricing engine integration and rate lock management for mortgage pricing automation, access e-sign and digital closing workflow for paperless mortgage processing, retrieve investor and secondary market integration for loan sale and delivery, manage borrower portal and application workflow for consumer-facing mortgage automation, and integrate Encompass loan data with appraisal, title, and servicing platforms.
use_cases: Automating loan origination from mortgage processing agents
Managing compliance checks from mortgage regulatory agents
Tracking underwriting conditions from loan operations agents
Integrating pricing data from mortgage pricing agents
not_for: Non-mortgage financial products without LOS requirements
Small mortgage brokers without enterprise LOS needs
Organizations using Empower or OpenClose LOS
best_when: A mortgage lender or bank using ICE Encompass wants AI agents to automate loan origination, document management, compliance tracking, underwriting conditions, and investor delivery workflow.
avoid_when: RESPA AND TRID RISK: Encompass manages mortgage loan data governed by RESPA, TRID (Know Before You Owe), and ECOA — automated Loan Estimate and Closing Disclosure generation requires exact regulatory timing compliance; disclosure timing errors create TRID violation risk and lender liability. HMDA data collection — automated HMDA demographic data capture must comply with Reg C; incorrect automated data collection creates CFPB HMDA audit findings. ICE Encompass SDK/API is complex with 2,000+ loan data fields; incorrect field mapping creates loan compliance data integrity issues.

auth.notes: ICE Encompass uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.icemortgagetechnology.com. Webhooks for loan events. REST API with JSON (Encompass Developer Connect). Pleasanton, California HQ (ICE Mortgage Technology — Intercontinental Exchange). ICE (NYSE: ICE) acquired Ellie Mae/Encompass (2020, $11B). Ellie Mae founded 1997. 3,500+ mortgage lender customers. Market-dominant LOS (35%+ US mortgage market share). Competes with Empower (Black Knight/ICE), BytePro, and OpenClose for mortgage LOS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise LOS subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-loan or per-user enterprise subscription
pricing.notes: Pleasanton, CA. ICE (NYSE: ICE). Ellie Mae acquired by ICE 2020 ($11B). Founded 1997. 3,500+ lender customers. 35%+ US mortgage LOS market. Competes with Empower (Black Knight) for LOS dominance.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: TRID TIMING COMPLIANCE: Automated Loan Estimate must be delivered within 3 business days of application; automated Closing Disclosure requires 3 business day waiting period before closing; TRID timing violation creates lender liability

HMDA Reg C compliance — automated HMDA data collection must use GMI (Government Monitoring Information) collection methodology; incorrect automated demographic data collection creates CFPB audit findings and fair lending risk
ECOA adverse action — automated credit decisions must generate ECOA-compliant adverse action notices within 30 days; automated denial without proper adverse action notice creates ECOA violation

2,000+ field complexity — Encompass has 2,000+ loan data fields with complex dependencies; incorrect field mapping in automated loan creation creates data integrity issues affecting compliance and investor delivery
ICE ecosystem coupling — Encompass now integrates deeply with other ICE products (Optimal Blue, Black Knight MSP); automated workflows may create unintended cross-product data flows

Encompass SDK vs REST API — Encompass has legacy .NET SDK and newer REST API (Developer Connect) with different capabilities; verify REST API coverage for your workflow — some features only in .NET SDK
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mortgage LOS. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US. Mortgage loan and borrower NPI data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mortgage LOS. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US. Mortgage loan and borrower data.
